notes:
## Highlights

- Added a full Skill Market with ClawHub and SkillHub rankings, search/tag filtering, localized descriptions, skill detail views, and a reviewed installation handoff to Nomi.
- Replaced one-off assistants with reusable presets and unified the agent execution architecture for more consistent conversations and orchestration.
- Restored OpenClaw remote control and added safer remote integration validation.
- Improved Windows reliability by isolating shell consoles, while fixing sidebar scrolling, linked-skill removal, MCP session ID normalization, stale completion/thinking states, and canonical UUIDv7 identifiers.
- Refined figure-library cards, themed checkbox selection, compact controls, and dark-mode capability readability.

## Upgrade notes

- No known manual configuration change is required for this release.
- This Windows-first release includes the Windows x64 installer and signed Tauri updater assets. macOS and Linux packages will be appended from their native build machines.
- The Windows installer is protected by the Tauri updater signature but is not Authenticode-signed, so manual downloads may show a SmartScreen or unknown-publisher warning.
